title: VerificationReport
description: Full agent verification report: one compose, no pending mutation.

behavior.description: Behavioral harness results when execution was allowed.

behavior_oracle.description:
Named, versioned behavioral oracle for the recognized routine shape.

Present when the contract matches a builtin harness profile. Equality
behavior for golden shapes (e.g. count-equal-byte) is proven by this
oracle plus vectors — not by weak contract `ensures` alone.

isolation.description: How execution was isolated (or that only static gates ran).

status.description: Aggregate status derived from stage results.

BehaviorOracle.description: Named deterministic behavioral oracle attached to a verification report.

claim.description: Human-readable claim checked by the oracle (not a formal ensures AST).

contract.description: Contract path or basename supplied to verify.

contract_ensures.description: Raw `ensures` expressions from the contract (may be weaker than the claim).

evidence_hash.description: Deterministic hash over oracle identity and vector evidence.

proof_basis.description: How equality/behavior was proven for this shape.

vectors_failed.description: Vectors that failed (0 when execution was not run).

vectors_passed.description: Vectors that passed (0 when execution was not run).

version.description: Integer profile version for this oracle id.

Coverage.description:
Instruction-level coverage counts (unknown ≠ verified).

Decode and lowering gates always use instruction counts here. Byte-level
detail belongs in error messages, not in these fields.

total.description: Total instructions presented to the gate.

ExecutableGate.description: Linked-image object-format gate (run only after link).

status.description: Whether the linked image is an executable container.

ExecutionIsolation.description:
How candidate/artifact execution was (or was not) isolated.

This is an honesty field for reports — SemASM does not claim OS sandboxing
(seccomp / job objects / containers) by default.

oneOf.description: No candidate/artifact process was started (static gates only).
Ran under a QEMU user-mode emulator.
Ran directly on the build host (no emulator wrapper).

GateStatus.description: Outcome of a single verification gate.

oneOf.description: Gate was not applicable or intentionally not run.

ProofBasis.description: How a recognized shape's behavioral claim was established.

oneOf.description: Named builtin oracle plus synthesized/evaluated vectors — not contract alone.

SemanticGates.description: Static semantic gates applied to the candidate relocatable object.

capability.description: Capability policy (e.g. no syscall in the candidate).

control.description:
Control-flow leaf policy (direct edges only on golden path).

Absent in older reports; deserializes as [`GateStatus::Passed`].

executable_bytes.description: Total executable bytes examined (metadata; not coverage units).

memory.description:
Memory effects leaf policy (read-only buffer leaves must not store).

Absent in older reports; deserializes as [`GateStatus::Passed`].

object_policy.description: Relocatable object, exports, and import policy.

VectorResult.description: Outcome of running the harness against a routine.

observed.description: Observed value (decimal string), or `<no output>` on parse failure.

VerificationStatus.description: Overall verification outcome after composing immutable stage results.

oneOf.description: Static gates and all behavioral vectors passed.
Linked image failed the executable-container policy.
Execution ran but one or more vectors failed.
Static gates passed; execution was not opted in.
